prompt: Replace the product images with characters from a popular video game.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the product image of the black motorcycle jacket in the left card with a character from a popular video game. Similarly, replace the product image of the woman in the white faux fur coat in the right card with a different character from a popular video game. Ensure the new character images fit within the existing product image frames.
objects: Screenshot of a web design application
A video game character in the left product card's image frame
A different video game character in the right product card's image frame
Purple background with a grid pattern
Text content of the left product card
Text content of the right product card
